sections.label: Verse 1
lines: A thusiam pen Pasian aw, deih teng cinna Na hi;
Na nuntakna laigil tawh, Amaute Na gawm
Sih dongin a amau tegel, A thuciam uh kip hen;
Na vangliatna tawh kigeel, Na thupha sang uh

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Leitungah Na om lai-in, Kana Na pai laitak;
Kiteenna pawi va simin, Tui lengtui
Tua lai mopina pawi a, Na thupha hong tung hen.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: nangun, Topa aw, Na huh in;
Haksatna a thuak ciangun, Na ompih tawntung in.
dong, Nang sungah kip uh hen;
Na innpi ah hong tun dong, Nangmah hong muang uh hen.
